ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trains" (
  "train_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each train */,
  "line_name" TEXT /* Name of the train line */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the train */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the train (e.g., on-time, delayed) */,
  "train_type" INTEGER /* ID of the train type */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the train */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the train */,
  "year_of_manufacture" INTEGER /* Year the train was manufactured */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Unique registration number of the train */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("train_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trains_train_type FOREIGN KEY ("train_type") REFERENCES train_types ("train_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "train_types" (
  "train_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each train type */,
  "train_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the train type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the train type */,
  "max_speed" REAL /* Maximum speed the train type can achieve */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel the train uses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("train_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "train_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "train_id" INTEGER /* ID of the train */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the train at the time of update */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date of the status update */,
  "status_time" TEXT /* Time of the status update */,
  "estimated_arrival_time" TEXT /* Estimated arrival time in case of delays */,
  "delay_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the delay in minutes */,
  "cause_of_status_change" TEXT /* Reason for the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_train_status_train_id FOREIGN KEY ("train_id") REFERENCES trains ("train_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "train_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location update */,
  "train_id" INTEGER /* ID of the train */,
  "location" TEXT /* Current location of the train */,
  "speed" REAL /* Current speed of the train */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the train's current location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the train's current location */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the location update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_train_locations_train_id FOREIGN KEY ("train_id") REFERENCES trains ("train_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "train_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "train_id" INTEGER /* ID of the train */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Departure time of the train */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Arrival time of the train */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route */,
  "route_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the route */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the train (e.g., daily, every 2 hours) */,
  "days_of_operation" TEXT /* Days on which the train operates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_train_schedules_train_id FOREIGN KEY ("train_id") REFERENCES trains ("train_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the route */,
  "start_station" TEXT /* Starting station of the route */,
  "end_station" TEXT /* Ending station of the route */,
  "distance" REAL /* Total distance of the route */,
  "estimated_travel_time" TEXT /* Estimated travel time for the route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "train_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "train_id" INTEGER /* ID of the train */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, repair) */,
  "maintenance_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the maintenance performed */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the maintenance in minutes */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_train_maintenance_train_id FOREIGN KEY ("train_id") REFERENCES trains ("train_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "train_delays" (
  "delay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delay record */,
  "train_id" INTEGER /* ID of the train */,
  "delay_date" TEXT /* Date of delay */,
  "delay_time" TEXT /* Time of delay */,
  "delay_reason" TEXT /* Reason for delay */,
  "affected_stations" TEXT /* Stations affected by the delay */,
  "impact_on_passengers" INTEGER /* Impact on passengers (e.g., number of passengers delayed) */,
  "estimated_recovery_time" TEXT /* Estimated time to recover from the delay */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_train_delays_train_id FOREIGN KEY ("train_id") REFERENCES trains ("train_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, train operator, maintenance personnel) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, action) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the setting */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_settings_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
